states.name: Young Rizette
states.title: Pure Blue
states.description: When she was young, Rizette was a very timid girl. She would jump in fear at distant footsteps or the howls of wolves. Fortunately, her grandmother was always there for her. Her kind words never failed to bring a smile back to Rizette's face. But she never did understand the "courage" her grandmother spoke of.

states.name: Young Rizette
states.title: Pure Blue
states.description:
When Rizette awakens, the sweet smell of pear pie fills the room. Half-asleep, she goes to the table, where her grandmother greets her with a smile. Theo arrives, still yawning, and the three of them start their day.
"Mm, so good!"
"Aah, hot!"
"Haha. Slow down, dear!"
"You're gonna burn your tongue again, Sis!"
She thought those days would last forever.

states.name: Young Rizette
states.title: Pure Blue
states.description: When Rizette was young, bandits attacked Westcarte, and in the chaos, her grandmother lost her life. She's repeated that day over and over, hoping that things could be different, but in the end, the past cannot be changed. Even so, her grandmother lives on within her, supporting her every day. Nothing in the world can change that, either.
